findings.description: Full class name `nablarch.test.OneShotLoopHandler` is absent from s5 hints, even though its counterpart `nablarch.fw.handler.RequestThreadLoopHandler` is included. Both appear in the source XML code examples and should be represented symmetrically.

The 構造 h2 section (estimated ~2700 chars plain text) contains 5 h3 subsections (StandaloneTestSupportTemplate, TestShot, BatchRequestTestSupport, MainForRequestTesting, FileSupport) that are folded into a single s3 without splitting. V3 rule: h2 >= 2000 chars with h3 subsections should be split.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 構造: StandaloneTestSupportTemplate (------), TestShot (--------), BatchRequestTestSupport (-----------------------), MainForRequestTesting (---------------------), FileSupport (-----------)

findings.description: The 各種設定値 h2 section (estimated ~2000+ chars including tables and XML code blocks) contains 2 h3 subsections (常駐バッチのテスト用ハンドラ構成, ディレクティブのデフォルト値) that are folded into a single s5 without splitting. V3 rule: h2 >= 2000 chars with h3 subsections should be split.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings under 各種設定値: 常駐バッチのテスト用ハンドラ構成 (-----), ディレクティブのデフォルト値 (---)
